title: Wing Fracture in the Redwall
summary: The Dragon's arthritic wing joint fractures during a chase with Axiarthanax through the Redwall Mountains, leaving him vulnerable and unable to fly.

title: Blood Allergy Crisis
summary: Saya applies an improvised bandage using the Dragon's blood but triggers a severe allergic reaction, causing the Dragon's condition to deteriorate rapidly.

title: Flight to Death
summary: The Dragon, in panic, attempts to flee the mountains to die but Saya stops him by creating a temporary blood seal, causing him to collapse in pain.

title: Sisterhood's Intervention
summary: Virelda Sun-Clad's Sisterhood arrives, interpreting the Dragon's condition as a sign to claim him as the 'Patriarch Serpent' and demanding Saya reveal his location and blood for their ritual.

title: Ritual Deception
summary: Saya uses the Dragon's knowledge of the Sisterhood's false Mother Flame ritual to trick Virelda into believing the Dragon is a threat, forcing the Sisterhood to retreat.

title: Lycan Lands Reckoning
summary: The Dragon and Saya escape into the Lycan Lands, where the Dragon's wing joint is healed through a shared ritual with his blood, and he accepts Saya as his true partner in the face of death.
